title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: AWS video tutorial explaining Identity and Access Management fundamentals, covering users, roles, policies, and the principle of least privilege. The content emphasizes security best practices such as avoiding administrator access for beginners and never storing access keys in code, with reference to AWS Access Analyzer as a tool for determining required permissions.
